summary: Test suite covers core requirements (JUnit/JSON parsing, aggregation, flaky detection, workflow integration) but has gaps. Missing: edge cases (malformed input, empty results, special chars in names), dependency checks (jq, act availability), fixture documentation explaining expected values, and comprehensive markdown format validation. The workflow.bats has only 2 test cases for a major requirement. Test logic issues: the grep pattern `^- .*testA$` won't correctly isolate flaky section checks. Hardcoded expected values (7/4/2/1) lack explanation of fixture contents. Would catch regressions on happy path but miss parsing failures, formatting issues, and error cases.
